title: EnergyResourceLoad
description: Typed schema for controllable load energy resources (smart HVAC, smart water heater, generic controllable load). These assets participate in demand-response and demand-flexibility programs. CIM: cim:EnergyConsumer / cim:ConformLoad (IEC 61970-301).

subResources.description: Child resources (e.g. individual zones of an HVAC system). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. the meter this load sits behind).

GeoJSONPoint.description: GeoJSON Point geometry (RFC 7946). Coordinates are [longitude, latitude].

EnergyResourceLoadAttributes.description: Attributes for controllable load resources. Includes common fields (make, model, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, gps) plus load-specific fields (controlProtocol, loadCategory).

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power draw, kW. CIM: GeneratingUnit.maxOperatingP.

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date when this load was commissioned.

gps.description: GeoJSON Point location of this asset. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] per RFC 7946.

controlProtocol.description: Demand-response / control protocol supported by this load device.

loadCategory.description: Functional category of this load. CIM: ConformLoad.conformLoadSchedule / load classification.
